home.heroText: Join a global community dedicated to preserving and discussing the ancient wisdom of Sanatan Dharma. Explore the library, read daily insights, and find your path.
home.ctaText: Sanatan Dharma is a journey of inquiry. Share your thoughts, ask questions, and explore the truth with our growing community.
home.discussText: Join real-time discussions on Vedas, Philosophy, Festivals, and more. No registration needed.
home.requestText: Have a topic you want explored? Submit your idea and shape the community's knowledge.

libraryHighlights.title: Spiritual Texts
libraryHighlights.excerpt: Explore timeless texts and scriptures from various traditions.

libraryHighlights.title: Audio Teachings
libraryHighlights.excerpt: Listen to guided meditations, chants, and talks by spiritual leaders.

libraryHighlights.title: Video Library
libraryHighlights.excerpt: Watch teachings, events, and satsangs from our community.

features.title: Community
features.content: Discuss and debate with fellow seekers.

features.title: Daily Insight
features.content: Start your day with a new Shloka.

about.heroSubtitle: "Bridging the gap between ancient Vedic tradition and modern inquiry."
about.missionText: To preserve the ancient wisdom of Sanatan Dharma and make it accessible to the modern world through technology and dialogue.
about.visionText: A global community united by the pursuit of Truth (Satya), grounded in Dharma, and inspired by the Vedas.
about.historyText: Sanatan Charcha began as a small study group in Prayagraj, dedicated to reading the Upanishads. Today, it has grown into a digital platform connecting seekers from across the globe.

library.heroText: Immerse yourself in the timeless ocean of Vedic wisdom. Access scriptures, commentaries, and rare texts preserved for the modern seeker.
library.shelfQuote: "A room without books is like a body without a soul."
library.loginMsg: Login to upload books to the library.
library.empty: The library shelf is currently empty.

blog.title: Sanatan Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights, reflections, and teachings from the path of Dharma.
blog.refreshText: Refresh the feed to see newly published articles.
blog.emptySub: The wisdom is yet to be written.

communication.title: Samvad (Communication)
communication.subtitle: Have a question about the scriptures? Want to contribute? Send us a message and join the discussion.
communication.error: Failed to send message. Try again.
communication.guidelinesText: We believe in Satyam (Truth) and Priyam (Kindness). Please ensure your messages are respectful.
communication.joinText: Our admins review every message. Selected questions will be answered in our Weekly Blog.

rules.heroText: Our platform is governed by the timeless principles of Yamas & Niyamas from Maharishi Patanjali's Yoga Sutras. These are the foundation of Dharmic living.
rules.codeSubtitle: Based on Patanjali's Yoga Sutras — the universal ethics for seekers
rules.topicsSubtitle: Content aligned with these areas of Hindu culture is encouraged
rules.mod1: All content is reviewed by the admin team before final publication.
rules.mod2: Violations of the Dharmic Code may result in content removal.
rules.mod3: Constructive criticism and respectful debate are always welcome.
rules.mod4: Admin reserves the right to edit or decline submissions that don't align with our community values.
rules.ctaText: Have a topic you'd like us to cover? Submit an article request and help shape the community's knowledge base.

request.heroText: Have a topic you want us to explore? Submit your idea and help shape the knowledge shared on Sanatan Charcha.
request.phTopic: e.g., The significance of Navratri in different regions
request.phDesc: Tell us why this topic is important...
request.success: ✅ Request submitted! Our team will review it.
request.error: ❌ Failed to submit. Please try again.
request.wishlistDesc: Topics approved by the community — articles on these are coming soon!
request.emptyWishlist: No approved requests yet. Be the first to suggest!

discussion.joinSubtitle: Enter a display name to join the discussion. No registration needed — just pure Dharmic discourse.
discussion.joinNote: By joining, you agree to follow our Dharmic Code of Conduct.
discussion.emptyText: This is the beginning of this channel. Start the conversation!

footer.aboutText: A cultural collaborative platform preserving Hindu wisdom and fostering community dialogue for all.
footer.copyright: Satya Sanatan Charcha. All rights reserved.

auth.loginSub: Sign in to request articles and participate in Charcha
auth.adminNote: Admins: Log in above with your official credentials to access the Dashboard.
